properties.name: api.security.token.secret
properties.description: JWT token secret for API security

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Configuration for allowed origins in CORS settings

properties.name: spring.mail.host
properties.description: SMTP server host for sending emails

properties.name: spring.mail.port
properties.description: SMTP server port for sending emails

properties.name: spring.mail.properties.mail.smtp.auth
properties.description: property to enable SMTP authentication for sending emails

properties.name: spring.mail.properties.mail.smtp.starttls.enable
properties.description: property to enable STARTTLS for sending emails
